# HP-41 14-segment font table, extracted from HP41C_Character_Display_Table.pdf
# Segment bit order: top,upper_left_vert,upper_right_vert,upper_left_diag,upper_right_diag,upper_center_vert,mid_left,mid_right,lower_left_vert,lower_right_vert,lower_left_diag,lower_right_diag,lower_center_vert,bottom
# code, char, 14-bit segment string, hex-of-14-bit-value

  0    '?'  10000000000000  0x2000
  1    '?'  10000111001100  0x21CC
  2    '?'  11111111111111  0x3FFF
  3    '?'  11111111111111  0x3FFF

 34    '"'  01000100000000  0x1100

 36    '$'  11000111010011  0x31D3
 37    '%'  01011111011100  0x17DC

 39    "'"  00000100000000  0x0100
 40    '('  00001000000100  0x0204
 41    ')'  00010000001000  0x0408
 42    '*'  00011111001110  0x07CE
 43    '+'  00000111000010  0x01C2
 44    ','  00000000000000  0x0000
 45    '-'  00000011000000  0x00C0
 46    '.'  00000000000000  0x0000
